title: vicia peregrina subsp. curvituba
intro: Vicia peregrina subsp. curvituba, also known as the curved-fruit vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vicia peregrina subsp. curvituba include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
